title: blbiLogin
description: The player login plugin created for higher versions, ensuring the security of server player assets
body:
Discord: https://discord.gg/KjXXbSgJru
If you have any suggestions or bugs, please provide feedback in discord.
You can also assist me with multilingual synchronization support

I couldn't implement Premium Players Bypass Login. The code I previously wrote is available at https://github.com/EggFine/blbiLogi...m/blbilink/blbilogin/modules/CheckOnline.java. If anyone can implement this feature on my behalf, feel free to submit a Pull Request.

This is my first plugin, thanks for Mgazul's(MohistMC) assistance in development.

Announcement
My new plugin, blbi Basic Function, is currently in development. Stay tuned for its release!
Additionally, this plugin will be a paid product. During the development phase, I am in need of some assistance with testing. As a token of appreciation, I will be granting the plugin to these contributors for free upon release. If you are interested in participating in the development testing, please consider joining my Discord server.
[/QUOTE]

![blbiLogin](https://github.com/EggFine/blbiLogin/blob/main/images/blbiLogin.png?raw=true)

![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/blbiLogin.svg)

Multi-language support ✅
Our plugins come with [zh_CN, en_US, ru_RU, ja_JP, ar_SA]  language packs by default. You can also write your own language file (language name.yaml) and place it there In the ./plugins/blbiLogin/languages directory, modify the language parameters in config.yml

zh_CN, en_US, ja_JP made by blbi Offical
ru_RU language pack Special thanks to: thejenja
ar_SA language pack Special thanks to: FOXY

Set up executable commands for players who are not logged in ✅

No configuration required, ready to use (SQLite) ✅

Sound effects, title, subtitle, actionbar ✅

If you have any suggestions or feedback, please join our Discord and we will do our best to solve your problems.

If you like my plugin, plz give the plugin 5 star!!!thank you very much!!!!
Your support is my biggest motivation to update


! important !
The Alpha version of the plugin still has many issues. Do not use it in a production environment!!!

! important !
Users still using Alpha 1.0 are advised to upgrade to Alpha 1.1 as soon as possible.


Commands And Permissions
/register <password>
/login <password>
/blbilogin reload | blbilogin.reload
